description.tr: Who Hanbros UK is on the United Kingdom origin Turkey corridor—corporate policies and legal texts sit under the corporate hub.
description.en: Who Hanbros UK is on the United Kingdom origin Turkey corridor—corporate policies and legal texts sit under the corporate hub.

description.tr: Transparent pricing, accurate paperwork and on-time delivery as operational promise—vision and quality policy have their own pages.
description.en: Transparent pricing, accurate paperwork and on-time delivery as operational promise—vision and quality policy have their own pages.

description.tr: End-to-end transparency and predictability in customer experience—live lookup and pricing requests sit on dedicated pages.
description.en: End-to-end transparency and predictability in customer experience—live lookup and pricing requests sit on dedicated pages.

description.tr: Continuous improvement through packing standards, damage-prevention checks and customer feedback loops; measurable service quality on every shipment.
description.en: Continuous improvement through packing standards, damage-prevention checks and customer feedback loops; measurable service quality on every shipment.

description.tr: Processing purposes, retention, cookies and sharing principles on-page; personal data categories are summarised on a separate page.
description.en: Processing purposes, retention, cookies and sharing principles on-page; personal data categories are summarised on a separate page.

description.tr: Categories of personal data, lawful bases and controller identity—the full privacy statement sits on the privacy policy page.
description.en: Categories of personal data, lawful bases and controller identity—the full privacy statement sits on the privacy policy page.

description.tr: How to submit access, rectification, erasure and objection requests with response timelines—the privacy policy explains processing principles.
description.en: How to submit access, rectification, erasure and objection requests with response timelines—the privacy policy explains processing principles.

description.tr: Website content is informational; customs and tax outcomes rest with authorities. Liability limits are summarised here.
description.en: Website content is informational; customs and tax outcomes rest with authorities. Liability limits are summarised here.
